scripts.pack:ui: cd ../workmate-ui && VITE_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:8080 VITE_TARGET=electron npm run build && rm -rf ../workmate-desktop/resources/ui && cp -r dist ../workmate-desktop/resources/ui
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run pack:ui && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --dir
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run pack:ui && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
